title: Ratnagiri Fort
tagline: Ratnagiri Fort — heritage city of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Ratnagiri Fort is a hill fort located in the Ratnagiri village near Rolla, in Sri Sathya Sai district of Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Ratnagiri Fort is a hill fort located in the Ratnagiri village near Rolla, in Sri Sathya Sai district of Andhra Pradesh, India. Located near the border of Andhra Pradesh and Karnataka in the Rayalaseema region, it is also known as Seema Golconda ("Golconda at the border"). The Government of India has designated it as a Monument of National Importance.

topPlaces.name: Rolla mandal
topPlaces.description: Rolla mandal is a mandal in Sri Sathya Sai district of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is part of Madakasira revenue division w.e.f 31 Dec 2025.

topPlaces.name: Medigeshi
topPlaces.description: Medigeshi or Midigeshi is a village in Madhugiri Taluk, Tumkur district in Karnataka, India. It has a population of 2,649 according to 2011 census.

topPlaces.name: Agali mandal
topPlaces.description: Agali mandal is a mandal in Sri Sathya Sai district of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is part of Madakasira revenue division w.e.f 31 Dec 2025.

items.note: Rolla mandal is a mandal in Sri Sathya Sai district of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is part of Madakasira revenue division w.e.f 31 Dec 2025.
Medigeshi or Midigeshi is a village in Madhugiri Taluk, Tumkur district in Karnataka, India. It has a population of 2,649 according to 2011 census.
Agali mandal is a mandal in Sri Sathya Sai district of Andhra Pradesh, India. It is part of Madakasira revenue division w.e.f 31 Dec 2025.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ratnagiri Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ratnagiri Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ratnagiri Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (92 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ratnagiri Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ratnagiri Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ratnagiri Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Ratnagiri Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ratnagiri Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rolla mandal, Medigeshi, Agali mandal.
